Package recoder.java.declaration

Class EnumConstantSpecification

java.lang.Object
recoder.java.JavaSourceElement
recoder.java.JavaProgramElement
recoder.java.JavaNonTerminalProgramElement
recoder.java.declaration.VariableSpecification
recoder.java.declaration.FieldSpecification
recoder.java.declaration.EnumConstantSpecification
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Cloneable, EnumConstant, Field, Member, ProgramModelElement, Variable, AccessFlags, Declaration, ExpressionContainer, NamedProgramElement, NonTerminalProgramElement, ProgramElement, SourceElement, ModelElement, NamedModelElement
public class EnumConstantSpecification extends FieldSpecification implements EnumConstant

  • Field Details

    • ref

      protected EnumConstructorReference ref
      a reference to the enum type. Note that this must always be set, even if no parantheses are present in the concrete syntax.
